<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"/>
<title>Panther OS</title>
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{--font:-apple-system,'SF Pro Display','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;--mono:'Courier New',Courier,monospace}
body{width:100vw;height:100vh;overflow:hidden;background:#030303;font-family:var(--font)}
canvas{position:fixed;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0}
#wallpaper{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .6s ease;pointer-events:none}
#wallpaper.active{opacity:1}

/* ═══ BOOT SCREEN ═══ */
#boot{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;
  background:#0a0a0a;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  transition:opacity .6s ease;
}
#boot.fade-out{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}

#boot-inner{
  display:flex;
  align-items:flex-start;
  gap:48px;
  font-family:var(--mono);
  font-size:13px;
  line-height:1.6;
  color:#00ff88;
  max-width:860px;
  width:100%;
  padding:0 40px;
}

/* scanline overlay */
#boot::after{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  inset:0;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(
    0deg,
    transparent,
    transparent 3px,
    rgba(0,0,0,.12) 3px,
    rgba(0,0,0,.12) 4px
  );
  pointer-events:none;
  z-index:1;
}

#boot-logo-col{
  flex-shrink:0;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;
  gap:12px;
}

#boot-ascii{
  font-family:var(--mono);
  font-size:11px;
  line-height:1.25;
  white-space:pre;
  color:#00ff88;
  text-shadow:0 0 8px #00ff88;
}

#boot-logo-img{
  width:120px;
  height:120px;
  object-fit:contain;
  filter:invert(1) sepia(1) saturate(3) hue-rotate(90deg) brightness(1.2) drop-shadow(0 0 10px #00ff88);
  display:none;
}

#boot-info-col{
  flex:1;
  min-width:0;
}

#boot-title{
  font-size:20px;
  font-weight:bold;
  color:#fff;
  margin-bottom:4px;
  text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,.4);
}

#boot-rule{
  color:#00ff88;
  margin-bottom:12px;
  text-shadow:0 0 6px #00ff88;
}

.boot-line{
  display:flex;
  gap:10px;
  margin-bottom:3px;
  opacity:0;
  transition:opacity .1s;
}
.boot-line.show{opacity:1}

.boot-key{
  color:#00ff88;
  text-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(0,255,136,.5);
  min-width:90px;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.boot-val{color:#e0e0e0}
.boot-val.hl{color:#fff}

.boot-colors{
  display:flex;
  gap:4px;
  margin-top:10px;
  opacity:0;
  transition:opacity .1s;
}
.boot-colors.show{opacity:1}
.boot-color{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:2px}

#boot-cursor{
  display:inline-block;
  width:8px;height:14px;
  background:#00ff88;
  margin-left:2px;
  vertical-align:middle;
  animation:blink .7s step-end infinite;
}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}

/* ═══ MAIN UI ═══ */
#ui{opacity:0;transition:opacity .7s ease}
#ui.show{opacity:1}

.glow-text{
  background:linear-gradient(160deg,#fff 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.82) 45%,rgba(255,255,255,.6) 70%,rgba(255,255,255,.88) 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(255,255,255,.85)) drop-shadow(0 0 22px rgba(255,255,255,.5))
}

/* TASKBAR */
.taskbar{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:48px;z-index:20;backdrop-filter:blur(32px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(32px);background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);box-shadow:0 -4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.4),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.05);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;padding:0 28px}
.taskbar-brand{position:absolute;left:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.taskbar-logo{width:20px;height:20px;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(255,255,255,.5))}
.taskbar-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em}
.taskbar-clock{position:absolute;right:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end}
.tb-time{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);letter-spacing:.05em}
.tb-date{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);letter-spacing:.04em}
.dock-item{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;width:42px;height:42px;transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.dock-item:hover{transform:translateY(-7px) scale(1.22)}
.dock-item:hover .tooltip{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.dock-item:active{transform:translateY(-3px) scale(1.05)}
.icon-wrap{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);transition:background .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.dock-item:hover .icon-wrap{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.icon-wrap img{width:20px;height:20px;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(255,255,255,.8)) drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(255,255,255,.4))}
.icon-wrap svg{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(255,255,255,.8)) drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(255,255,255,.4));transition:transform .6s ease}
.dock-item:hover .icon-wrap svg{transform:rotate(65deg)}
.dock-sep{width:1px;height:24px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);margin:0 2px}
.tooltip{position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 6px);background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:7px;padding:3px 9px;font-size:10.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px);transition:opacity .15s,transform .15s;pointer-events:none}

/* BROWSER */
.bw{position:fixed;z-index:30;width:960px;height:640px;top:calc(50% - 24px);left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;backdrop-filter:blur(40px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(40px);background:rgba(6,6,6,.92);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);box-shadow:0 30px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.85),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.07);display:none;flex-direction:column;min-width:500px;min-height:340px}
.bw.open{display:flex}
.bw.fs{top:0!important;left:0!important;transform:none!important;width:100vw!important;height:calc(100vh - 48px)!important;border-radius:0!important}
.resize-h{position:absolute;right:0;bottom:0;width:16px;height:16px;cursor:se-resize;z-index:5;background:linear-gradient(135deg,transparent 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.08) 50%);border-radius:0 0 14px 0}
.b-title{height:40px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 0 0 12px;cursor:move;user-select:none;flex-shrink:0}
.tabs{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;padding:0 4px}
.tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.tab{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:7px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;max-width:150px;min-width:70px;transition:background .15s,color .15s;flex-shrink:0}
.tab.on{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.tab-t{overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;flex:1}
.tab-x{width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);transition:background .15s,color .15s}
.tab-x:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);color:#fff}
.newtab-btn{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:6px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);font-size:15px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s,color .15s;margin:0 8px 0 4px}
.newtab-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)}
.win-btns{display:flex;align-items:stretch;height:40px;flex-shrink:0}
.win-btn{width:46px;height:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);transition:background .12s,color .12s;background:transparent}
.win-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:rgba(255,255,255,.95)}
.win-close:hover{background:rgba(196,43,28,.9)!important;color:#fff!important}
.b-bar{height:46px;padding:0 10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;flex-shrink:0}
.nb{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:8px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);cursor:pointer;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);transition:background .15s,color .15s}
.nb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);color:rgba(255,255,255,.85)}
.addr-wrap{flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center}
.addr{width:100%;height:32px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);font-size:12.5px;font-family:var(--font);padding:0 36px;outline:none;transition:border-color .15s,background .15s;letter-spacing:.02em}
.addr:focus{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.22);background:rgba(255,255,255,.08)}
.addr-ico{position:absolute;left:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.28);font-size:12px;pointer-events:none}
.addr-go{position:absolute;right:8px;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);transition:background .15s,color .15s}
.addr-go:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:#fff}
.lb{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.2),rgba(255,255,255,.9));border-radius:1px;width:0%;transition:width .4s ease;z-index:5;pointer-events:none}
.b-content{flex:1;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#050505}
.b-frame{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:none;display:none}
.b-frame.on{display:block}
.ntp{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(5,5,5,.97);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:18px}
.ntp.on{display:flex}
.ntp-logo{width:56px;height:56px;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 16px rgba(255,255,255,.35))}
.ntp-name{font-size:26px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#fff 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.5) 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.proxy-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 12px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.07em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25)}
.proxy-badge.ok{border-color:rgba(80,220,120,.25);background:rgba(80,220,120,.05);color:rgba(80,220,120,.7)}
.proxy-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;flex-shrink:0}
.ntp-search{display:flex;align-items:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden;width:440px;height:42px}
.ntp-search input{flex:1;background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);font-size:14px;font-family:var(--font);padding:0 18px;height:100%}
.ntp-search input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,.22)}
.ntp-go{width:42px;height:42px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);transition:background .15s,color .15s;flex-shrink:0}
.ntp-go:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.13);color:#fff}

/* SETTINGS */
.so{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:50;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;padding-bottom:56px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .2s}
.so.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.sp{backdrop-filter:blur(32px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(32px);background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);border-radius:20px;padding:24px 26px;width:360px;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;scrollbar-width:none;box-shadow:0 -4px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.6),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.07);transform:translateY(20px);transition:transform .28s cubic-bezier(.34,1.4,.64,1)}
.sp::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.so.open .sp{transform:translateY(0)}
.sh{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px}
.st{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9)}
.sc2{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);font-size:13px;transition:background .15s,color .15s}
.sc2:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:rgba(255,255,255,.9)}
.ss{margin-bottom:18px}
.sl{font-size:9.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.13em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px}
.sr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:11px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);margin-bottom:5px}
.srl{font-size:12.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.78)}
.tg{width:38px;height:21px;border-radius:11px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);position:relative;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s}
.tg.on{background:rgba(255,255,255,.55)}
.tg::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.4);transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1)}
.tg.on::after{transform:translateX(17px)}
.rng{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:100px;height:3px;border-radius:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);outline:none;cursor:pointer}
.rng::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.4);cursor:pointer}
.si{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);font-size:12.5px;font-family:var(--font);outline:none;width:120px;transition:border-color .15s}
.si:focus{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.28)}
.wp-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:7px;margin-top:7px}
.wp-option{border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;transition:border-color .15s,transform .15s;position:relative;aspect-ratio:16/9;background:#111}
.wp-option:hover{transform:scale(1.03)}
.wp-option.selected{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)}
.wp-option img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.wp-option .wp-label{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:4px 7px;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,.7));letter-spacing:.06em}
.wp-none{border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);transition:border-color .15s;padding:7px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:11.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}
.wp-none.selected{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)}
.wp-none:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07)}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- BOOT SCREEN -->
<div id="boot">
  <div id="boot-inner">
    <div id="boot-logo-col">
      <img id="boot-logo-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Panther"/>
      <pre id="boot-ascii"></pre>
    </div>
    <div id="boot-info-col">
      <div id="boot-title">root@panther</div>
      <div id="boot-rule">─────────────────────────────</div>
      <div id="boot-lines"></div>
      <div id="boot-prompt" style="margin-top:10px;color:#00ff88;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;display:none">
        [root@panther ~]$ <span id="boot-cursor"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MAIN UI -->
<div id="ui">
  <canvas id="c"></canvas>
  <div id="wallpaper"></div>

  <div class="bw" id="bw">
    <div class="resize-h" id="rh"></div>
    <div class="b-title" id="btitle">
      <div class="tabs" id="tabs"></div>
      <div class="newtab-btn" onclick="newTab()">+</div>
      <div class="win-btns">
        <div class="win-btn" onclick="minimizeBrowser()">&#8211;</div>
        <div class="win-btn" onclick="toggleFS()">&#9633;</div>
        <div class="win-btn win-close" onclick="closeBrowser()">&#10005;</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="b-bar">
      <div class="nb" onclick="goBack()"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M9 2L4 7L9 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      <div class="nb" onclick="goFwd()"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M5 2L10 7L5 12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      <div class="nb" onclick="reload()"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M2.5 7A4.5 4.5 0 0 1 11 4.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M11.5 7A4.5 4.5 0 0 1 3 9.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M11 2v2.5H8.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M3 11.5V9H5.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      <div class="addr-wrap">
        <span class="addr-ico"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><circle cx="5.5" cy="5.5" r="3.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"/><path d="M8.5 8.5L11 11" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></span>
        <input class="addr" id="addr" type="text" placeholder="Search or type a URL..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')navigate(this.value)"/>
        <div class="addr-go" onclick="navigate(document.getElementById('addr').value)"><svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none"><path d="M2 5h6M5.5 2l3 3-3 3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="b-content" id="bc"><div class="lb" id="lb"></div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="taskbar">
    <div class="taskbar-brand">
      <img class="taskbar-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/>
      <span class="glow-text taskbar-name" id="tbBrand">panther</span>
    </div>
    <div class="dock-item" onclick="window.open('https://discord.com','_blank')">
      <div class="tooltip">Discord</div>
      <div class="icon-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dock-item" onclick="window.open('https://t.me','_blank')">
      <div class="tooltip">Telegram</div>
      <div class="icon-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dock-sep"></div>
    <div class="dock-item" onclick="openBrowser()">
      <div class="tooltip">Browser</div>
      <div class="icon-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dock-item" onclick="window.open('https://twitch.tv','_blank')">
      <div class="tooltip">Gaming</div>
      <div class="icon-wrap"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dock-sep"></div>
    <div class="dock-item" onclick="openSettings()">
      <div class="tooltip">Settings</div>
      <div class="icon-wrap">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.88)" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" width="18" height="18">
          <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.68 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 4.68a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 19.4 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="taskbar-clock">
      <span class="tb-time" id="tb-time"></span>
      <span class="tb-date" id="tb-date"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="so" id="so" onclick="closeOutside(event)">
    <div class="sp">
      <div class="sh"><span class="st">Settings</span><div class="sc2" onclick="closeSettings()">&#10005;</div></div>
      <div class="ss">
        <div class="sl">Appearance</div>
        <div class="sr"><span class="srl">Title name</span><input class="si" type="text" value="panther" maxlength="20" oninput="document.getElementById('tbBrand').textContent=this.value"/></div>
        <div class="sr"><span class="srl">Particles</span><input class="rng" type="range" min="20" max="200" value="120" oninput="targetCount=parseInt(this.value)"/></div>
        <div class="sr"><span class="srl">24-hour clock</span><div class="tg" onclick="this.classList.toggle('on');use24=this.classList.contains('on')"></div></div>
        <div class="sr"><span class="srl">Light streaks</span><div class="tg on" onclick="this.classList.toggle('on');showStreaks=this.classList.contains('on')"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="ss">
        <div class="sl">Particle color</div>
        <div class="sr"><span class="srl">Glow color</span>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
            <div id="colorPreview" style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0" onclick="document.getElementById('colorPicker').click()"></div>
            <input type="color" id="colorPicker" value="#ffffff" style="opacity:0;position:absolute;width:0;height:0;pointer-events:none" oninput="applyColor(this.value)" onchange="applyColor(this.value)"/>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);cursor:pointer" onclick="document.getElementById('colorPicker').click()">Pick any color</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ss">
        <div class="sl">Background</div>
        <div class="sr"><span class="srl">Glow intensity</span><input class="rng" type="range" min="0" max="100" value="60" oninput="glowOpacity=this.value/100"/></div>
      </div>
      <div class="ss">
        <div class="sl">Wallpaper</div>
        <div class="wp-none selected" id="wpNone" onclick="setWallpaper(null,this)">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"/><path d="M4 7h6M7 4v6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
          None (animated background)
        </div>
        <div class="wp-grid">
          <div class="wp-option" onclick="setWallpaper('data:image/jpeg;base64,',this)">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""/><div class="wp-label">Windows Dark</div>
          </div>
          <div class="wp-option" onclick="setWallpaper('data:image/jpeg;base64,',this)">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""/><div class="wp-label">Glass Pillars</div>
          </div>
          <div class="wp-option" onclick="setWallpaper('data:image/jpeg;base64,',this)">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt=""/><div class="wp-label">Anime Dark</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="/scram/scramjet.bundle.js"></script>
<script>
// ═══════════════════════
// BOOT SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════
(function(){
  const DURATION = 4500;
  
  const asciiArt = `    .-"-.
   /|6 6|\
  | | = | |
  |  \_/  |
  \       /
   '-___-'
   /|   |\
  / |   | \
 /  |___|  \
/__/ _|_ \__\
   (/ | \)`;

  const infoLines = [
    ['OS',       'Panther OS v1.0'],
    ['Host',     'glassmorphism-desktop'],
    ['Kernel',   '6.5.0-panther-1'],
    ['Uptime',   '0 min'],
    ['Packages', '42 (npm)'],
    ['Shell',    'node v22.0'],
    ['Terminal', 'panther-term'],
    ['CPU',      'Wisp Proxy Engine'],
    ['GPU',      'Scramjet Renderer'],
    ['Memory',   '∞ MiB / ∞ MiB'],
  ];

  const colors = ['#ff0000','#ff8800','#ffff00','#00ff00','#0088ff','#8800ff','#ff00ff','#ffffff'];

  const asciiEl = document.getElementById('boot-ascii');
  const linesEl = document.getElementById('boot-lines');
  const promptEl = document.getElementById('boot-prompt');
  
  // Type ASCII art first
  let asciiIdx = 0;
  const asciiTimer = setInterval(() => {
    asciiEl.textContent = asciiArt.slice(0, ++asciiIdx);
    if(asciiIdx >= asciiArt.length) clearInterval(asciiTimer);
  }, 18);

  // Reveal info lines one by one
  const lineDelay = DURATION * 0.65 / infoLines.length;
  infoLines.forEach((line, i) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'boot-line show';
      div.innerHTML = `<span class="boot-key">${line[0]}</span><span class="boot-val">: ${line[1]}</span>`;
      linesEl.appendChild(div);
    }, 400 + i * lineDelay);
  });

  // Color blocks
  setTimeout(() => {
    const colDiv = document.createElement('div');
    colDiv.className = 'boot-colors show';
    colors.forEach(c => {
      const s = document.createElement('div');
      s.className = 'boot-color';
      s.style.background = c;
      colDiv.appendChild(s);
    });
    linesEl.appendChild(colDiv);
  }, 400 + infoLines.length * lineDelay);

  // Show prompt cursor
  setTimeout(() => {
    promptEl.style.display = 'block';
  }, DURATION * 0.88);

  // Fade out and show main UI
  setTimeout(() => {
    const boot = document.getElementById('boot');
    boot.classList.add('fade-out');
    document.getElementById('ui').classList.add('show');
    setTimeout(() => { boot.style.display = 'none'; startBg(); }, 700);
  }, DURATION);
})();

// ═══════════════════════
// CANVAS BACKGROUND
// ═══════════════════════
const canvas=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
let pR=255,pG=255,pB=255,glowOpacity=.6,showStreaks=true,targetCount=120,use24=false,wallpaperActive=false,bgRunning=false;
function resize(){canvas.width=innerWidth;canvas.height=innerHeight}
resize();window.addEventListener('resize',resize);
class Particle{constructor(){this.reset(true)}reset(i){this.x=Math.random()*canvas.width;this.y=i?Math.random()*canvas.height:canvas.height+5;this.r=Math.random()*1.2+.3;this.speed=Math.random()*.25+.05;this.opacity=Math.random()*.5+.1;this.drift=(Math.random()-.5)*.12;this.pulse=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;this.pulseSpeed=Math.random()*.015+.005}update(){this.y-=this.speed;this.x+=this.drift;this.pulse+=this.pulseSpeed;if(this.y<-5)this.reset(false)}draw(){const a=this.opacity*(.7+.3*Math.sin(this.pulse));ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(this.x,this.y,this.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(${pR},${pG},${pB},${a})`;ctx.fill()}}
const particles=[];for(let i=0;i<120;i++)particles.push(new Particle());
const lines=[];for(let i=0;i<6;i++)lines.push({x:Math.random()*canvas.width,y:Math.random()*canvas.height,len:Math.random()*100+50,speed:Math.random()*.3+.1,opacity:Math.random()*.06+.02,angle:-Math.PI/2+(Math.random()-.5)*.3});
function startBg(){if(bgRunning)return;bgRunning=true;drawBg()}
function drawBg(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);if(!wallpaperActive){ctx.fillStyle='#030303';ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height)}const cx=canvas.width/2,cy=canvas.height/2;const g=ctx.createRadialGradient(cx,cy,0,cx,cy,canvas.width*.6);g.addColorStop(0,`rgba(${pR*.15},${pG*.15},${pB*.15},${wallpaperActive?glowOpacity*.4:glowOpacity})`);g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(3,3,3,0)');ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);if(showStreaks)lines.forEach(l=>{l.y-=l.speed;if(l.y<-l.len){l.y=canvas.height+l.len;l.x=Math.random()*canvas.width}const x2=l.x+Math.cos(l.angle)*l.len,y2=l.y+Math.sin(l.angle)*l.len;const lg=ctx.createLinearGradient(l.x,l.y,x2,y2);lg.addColorStop(0,`rgba(${pR},${pG},${pB},0)`);lg.addColorStop(.5,`rgba(${pR},${pG},${pB},${l.opacity})`);lg.addColorStop(1,`rgba(${pR},${pG},${pB},0)`);ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(l.x,l.y);ctx.lineTo(x2,y2);ctx.strokeStyle=lg;ctx.lineWidth=.5;ctx.stroke()});while(particles.length<targetCount)particles.push(new Particle());while(particles.length>targetCount)particles.pop();particles.forEach(p=>{p.update();p.draw()});requestAnimationFrame(drawBg)}

const wpEl=document.getElementById('wallpaper');
function setWallpaper(d,el){document.querySelectorAll('.wp-option,.wp-none').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('selected'));el.classList.add('selected');if(!d){wpEl.classList.remove('active');wallpaperActive=false;canvas.style.opacity='1';document.body.style.background='#030303'}else{wpEl.style.backgroundImage=`url(${d})`;wpEl.classList.add('active');wallpaperActive=true;canvas.style.opacity='.4';document.body.style.background='#000'}}

function updateClock(){const now=new Date();let h=now.getHours(),m=now.getMinutes();const days=['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'],months=['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];document.getElementById('tb-date').textContent=days[now.getDay()]+' '+months[now.getMonth()]+' '+now.getDate();if(use24){document.getElementById('tb-time').textContent=String(h).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(m).padStart(2,'0')}else{const ap=h>=12?'PM':'AM';h=h%12||12;document.getElementById('tb-time').textContent=String(h).padStart(2,'0')+':'+String(m).padStart(2,'0')+' '+ap}}
updateClock();setInterval(updateClock,1000);

function openSettings(){document.getElementById('so').classList.add('open')}
function closeSettings(){document.getElementById('so').classList.remove('open')}
function closeOutside(e){if(e.target===document.getElementById('so'))closeSettings()}
function applyColor(hex){const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16),g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16),b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);pR=r;pG=g;pB=b;document.getElementById('colorPreview').style.background=hex}

// BROWSER
const BW=document.getElementById('bw'),tabsEl=document.getElementById('tabs'),addrEl=document.getElementById('addr'),bcEl=document.getElementById('bc'),lbEl=document.getElementById('lb');
let tabs=[],activeId=null,isFS=false,sjReady=false;
async function initProxy(){if(sjReady)return;try{await navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js',{scope:'/'});await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;const {ScramjetController}=$scramjetLoadController();const sj=new ScramjetController({prefix:'/scram/service/',files:{wasm:'/scram/scramjet.wasm.wasm',all:'/scram/scramjet.all.js',sync:'/scram/scramjet.sync.js'}});await sj.init('/sw.js');const {BareMuxConnection}=await import('/baremux/worker.js').catch(()=>({}));if(BareMuxConnection){const conn=new BareMuxConnection('/baremux/worker.js');await conn.setTransport('/baremux/worker.js',[{wisp:`${location.protocol==='https:'?'wss':'ws'}://${location.host}/wisp/`}])}sjReady=true;updateProxyBadge(true)}catch(e){updateProxyBadge(false)}}
function updateProxyBadge(ok){document.querySelectorAll('.proxy-badge').forEach(b=>{b.className='proxy-badge'+(ok?' ok':'');b.innerHTML=`<div class="proxy-dot"></div>${ok?'Proxy active':'Run server.js for proxy'}`})}
function openBrowser(){BW.classList.add('open');if(!tabs.length)newTab();initProxy()}
function closeBrowser(){BW.classList.remove('open')}
function minimizeBrowser(){BW.classList.remove('open')}
function toggleFS(){isFS=!isFS;BW.classList.toggle('fs',isFS)}
function uid(){return 't'+Date.now()+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6)}
function newTab(url){const id=uid();const frame=document.createElement('iframe');frame.className='b-frame';frame.id='f'+id;frame.setAttribute('sandbox','allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms allow-popups allow-top-navigation');bcEl.appendChild(frame);const ntp=document.createElement('div');ntp.className='ntp';ntp.id='ntp'+id;ntp.innerHTML=`<img class="ntp-logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/><div class="ntp-name">panther</div><div class="proxy-badge"><div class="proxy-dot"></div>Checking...</div><div class="ntp-search"><input type="text" placeholder="Search or type a URL..." id="ni${id}" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')navigate(this.value)"/><div class="ntp-go" onclick="navigate(document.getElementById('ni${id}').value)"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M3 7h8M7.5 3l4 4-4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div></div>`;bcEl.appendChild(ntp);tabs.push({id,url:'',title:'New Tab',frame,ntp});switchTab(id);renderTabs();setTimeout(()=>updateProxyBadge(sjReady),200);if(url)loadUrl(id,url)}
function switchTab(id){activeId=id;tabs.forEach(t=>{t.frame.classList.remove('on');t.ntp.classList.remove('on')});const t=tabs.find(t=>t.id===id);if(!t)return;if(t.url){t.frame.classList.add('on');addrEl.value=t.url}else{t.ntp.classList.add('on');addrEl.value=''}renderTabs()}
function closeTab(id,e){e.stopPropagation();const idx=tabs.findIndex(t=>t.id===id);const t=tabs[idx];t.frame.remove();t.ntp.remove();tabs.splice(idx,1);if(!tabs.length){closeBrowser();return}switchTab(tabs[Math.min(idx,tabs.length-1)].id);renderTabs()}
function renderTabs(){tabsEl.innerHTML='';tabs.forEach(t=>{const el=document.createElement('div');el.className='tab'+(t.id===activeId?' on':'');el.innerHTML=`<span class="tab-t">${t.title}</span><span class="tab-x" onclick="closeTab('${t.id}',event)">&#10005;</span>`;el.onclick=()=>switchTab(t.id);tabsEl.appendChild(el)})}
function processUrl(r){r=r.trim();if(!r)return null;if(/^https?:\/\//i.test(r))return r;if(/^[\w-]+\.[\w]{2,}/.test(r)&&!r.includes(' '))return'https://'+r;return'https://www.google.com/search?q='+encodeURIComponent(r)}
function navigate(r){const u=processUrl(r);if(u&&activeId)loadUrl(activeId,u)}
function loadUrl(id,url){const t=tabs.find(t=>t.id===id);if(!t)return;t.url=url;try{t.title=new URL(url).hostname}catch(e){t.title=url.slice(0,20)}renderTabs();addrEl.value=url;t.ntp.classList.remove('on');lbEl.style.width='0%';setTimeout(()=>lbEl.style.width='55%',50);setTimeout(()=>lbEl.style.width='82%',800);let src=url;if(sjReady){try{src='/scram/service/'+encodeURIComponent(url)}catch(e){}}t.frame.src=src;t.frame.classList.add('on');t.frame.onload=()=>{lbEl.style.width='100%';setTimeout(()=>lbEl.style.width='0%',350);try{const tt=t.frame.contentDocument?.title;if(tt)t.title=tt}catch(e){}renderTabs()}}
function goBack(){const t=tabs.find(t=>t.id===activeId);if(t?.frame)try{t.frame.contentWindow.history.back()}catch(e){}}
function goFwd(){const t=tabs.find(t=>t.id===activeId);if(t?.frame)try{t.frame.contentWindow.history.forward()}catch(e){}}
function reload(){const t=tabs.find(t=>t.id===activeId);if(t?.url)loadUrl(activeId,t.url)}
(()=>{const tb=document.getElementById('btitle');let d=false,sx,sy,ox,oy;tb.addEventListener('mousedown',e=>{if(isFS||e.target.closest('.win-btns,.tab,.tab-x,.newtab-btn'))return;d=true;const r=BW.getBoundingClientRect();sx=e.clientX;sy=e.clientY;ox=r.left;oy=r.top;BW.style.transform='none';BW.style.left=ox+'px';BW.style.top=oy+'px';document.body.style.userSelect='none'});document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{if(!d)return;BW.style.left=(ox+e.clientX-sx)+'px';BW.style.top=(oy+e.clientY-sy)+'px'});document.addEventListener('mouseup',()=>{d=false;document.body.style.userSelect=''})})();
(()=>{const h=document.getElementById('rh');let r=false,sx,sy,sw,sh;h.addEventListener('mousedown',e=>{if(isFS)return;r=true;sx=e.clientX;sy=e.clientY;sw=BW.offsetWidth;sh=BW.offsetHeight;e.preventDefault()});document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{if(!r)return;BW.style.width=Math.max(500,sw+e.clientX-sx)+'px';BW.style.height=Math.max(340,sh+e.clientY-sy)+'px'});document.addEventListener('mouseup',()=>r=false)})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
